name.zh: 东莞凯乐格服饰有限公司
name.en: Dongguan City Kellogg Clothing Co., Ltd.

description.en:
Based in China, we specialize in high-end heavyweight hoodies, offering premium fabric weights of 500gsm, 580gsm, and 640gsm, alongside a diverse range of quality T-shirts, sweatshirts.
Our facility integrates advanced craftsmanship, including precision screen printing, intricate embroidery, and specialized garment washing techniques. We are committed to delivering superior durability and a modern aesthetic for global brands. Partner with us to elevate your streetwear collection with unmatched texture and professional execution.

address.en: Room#1102, Hua Ding Building, No#34 Bo Chong Road, Humen Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong Province, China
